title: Wrote First Commodore BASIC Program
tagline: Initiated a life-long software development journey via low-level Commodore BASIC architecture.
description: Explored early computational frameworks under professional guidance, mastering the basics of script execution, loops, and system outputs on the Commodore Vic 20. This fundamental hands-on experience catalyzed a decades-long passion for computing, problem-solving, and clean software architecture.

title: Assembled Apple II+ Microcomputer from Bare Metal
tagline: Etched circuits and soldered system boards to engineer a functional Apple II+ clone.
description: Constructed a fully operational Apple II+ computing system from the hardware level up under the mentorship of an electronics technician. Designed and mapped logical circuitry manually using physical masking agents, acid-etched custom PCB system boards, and meticulously hand-soldered resistors, capacitors, and IC sockets to master hardware design principles from the bare metal.

title: Slackware Linux Infrastructure Deployment
tagline: Deployed and compiled early Slackware Linux kernels to master open-source environments.
description: Configured and provisioned a primary workstation using the landmark Slackware v1.2 release. Gained rigorous experience with kernel configurations, manual partition optimization, command-line system administration, compile-time flags, and software dependency management. Built a foundational command of Unix/Linux architectures that serves as the root of a modern production workspace.

title: Hardware Systems Integration & Diagnostics
tagline: Assembled, repaired, and tuned high-performance personal computer arrays.
description: Operated as a hardware technician diagnostics specialist for a high-volume local technology vendor. Conducted component-level troubleshooting, system stress testing, and hardware component upgrades. Diagnosed faults in custom assemblies and re-built system environments while delivering technical support to ensure optimal machine performance.

title: Data-Entry Pipeline Optimization
client_or_company: Blue Hills Child and Family Services
tagline: Built standalone data systems to organize sensitive legal client documentation.
description: Engineered a secure, custom data entry application using a relational database engine to index, structure, and maintain highly sensitive legal documentation for client intake workflows[cite: 297]. Designed clean input forms that drastically reduced clerical entry errors, ensuring robust transactional compliance and high-availability access for case workers[cite: 297].

title: Insurance Discrepancy Reconciliation Engine
tagline: Automated cross-platform data auditing and secure transactional file transfers.
description: Architected 'Vareport', a financial data reconciliation engine that parsed and cross-referenced multi-broker monthly transactional data files against core corporate ledgers to automatically identify, catalog, and output discrepancy matrices[cite: 297]. Concurrently built 'Transport', a companion cross-platform secure networking script utilizing Java to pipe verified error logs directly to upstream underwriting providers[cite: 297].

title: Enterprise Database Centralization & Core Infrastructure Restructuring
tagline: Restructured corporate network topologies and consolidated siloed data into centralized systems.
description: Overhauled and physically re-wired the firm's internal corporate networking topography, completely isolating routing issues, preventing packet collisions, and applying rigid physical-layer network security protocols[cite: 287]. Aggregated disjointed spreadsheet silos into a unified enterprise database platform by executing schema mappings, custom data cleaning transformations, and loading procedures from Excel and Access into Microsoft SQL Server[cite: 287]. Designed automated business reporting solutions using Visual Basic and Crystal Reports to streamline management audit workflows[cite: 287].

title: Computer Programmer Diploma & Lab Innovation
client_or_company: Georgian College of Applied Arts and Sciences
tagline: Graduated Dean's List and engineered assistive technology text parsing pipelines.
description: Completed a rigorous software engineering curriculum, earning a formal programming credentials with consecutive Dean's List distinctions[cite: 284]. Supervised and maintained laboratory computer hardware installations[cite: 284]. Pioneered automation strategies within the Learning Disabilities media lab, converting unstructured analog files into structured digital standard text schemas ready for integration with automated text-to-speech assistive engines[cite: 284].

title: Web Provisioning & Infrastructure Architecture
tagline: Managed domain provisioning, digital branding pipelines, and secure storage deployment.
description: Delivered tactical technology consultations to guide corporate hardware, network capacity, and software ecosystem acquisitions[cite: 285]. Administered initial public web infrastructure footprints, including custom domain configurations and multi-tenant web hosting server spaces[cite: 285]. Built and maintained a secure corporate file storage server to preserve data integrity across operational departments[cite: 286].

title: Mobile Device Quality Assurance Engineering
tagline: Conducted high-precision hardware diagnostics and automated quality controls for BlackBerry devices.
description: Contributed to the high-reliability production pipeline of BlackBerry enterprise mobile devices[cite: 255]. Executed structured hardware quality assurance methodologies, verifying radio hardware compliance, device assembly integrity, firmware stability, and functional interfaces against stringent quality baselines to ensure defect-free deployments[cite: 256].

title: Enterprise Framework Architecture & SR&ED R&D Management
tagline: Designed custom MVC model engines and caching layers for major insurance platforms.
description: Onboarded as an Intermediate Web Developer and rapidly accelerated to Lead Developer within 90 days to manage the complete system roadmap[cite: 271, 272]. Engineered high-efficiency framework-less object-relational modeling layers and micro-caching structures tailored for high-volume enterprise software installations[cite: 272]. Architected a multi-client modular web application platform, restructuring the engineering loop from standalone custom builds into scalable vertical-market code pipelines[cite: 272, 273]. Successfully authorized technical documentation qualifying for Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) financial tax frameworks[cite: 276].

title: Responsive MVC Web Deployment
tagline: Designed and deployed a lightweight, secure framework application for a medical practice.
description: Architected and delivered a responsive, high-performance static public web platform utilizing the Laravel modern PHP application layer. Leveraged MVC design configurations to build clean, maintainable view routes, ensuring excellent layout visibility across desktop and mobile devices while optimizing page load metrics to increase new client bookings.

title: Official Dart Sublime Text Linter Package
tagline: Developed the native Dart code linter and syntax runtime library for Sublime Text 3.
description: Engineered an internal, high-performance static analysis and syntax code linter utility written in Python using native IDE APIs to maximize development velocity[cite: 237, 238]. Upon demonstrated utility within the community, collaborated with the Google Dart Developer Relations lead to abstract, package, and open-source the code base on GitHub. Maintained the package as a community standard tool used globally by early developers of the language[cite: 238].

title: Greenfield Web Port of Hyper Interactive Reality (HiR)
tagline: Ported a desktop video processing utility into an immersive, browser-native Dart app.
description: Collaborated with an engineering partner to architect a web-accessible application representing complex digital objects, media outputs, and immersive world calculations directly within the browser ecosystem[cite: 245]. Built a canvas rendering pipeline capable of manipulating real-time video feeds with custom visual filters, compiling cleanly from clean Dart codebases to deliver zero-lag desktop graphics speeds inside client browsers[cite: 246, 247].

title: E-Commerce Pipeline Architecture & Custom Integration
tagline: Engineered a secure WooCommerce checkout environment with custom frontend interactivity.
description: Architected a custom digital e-commerce web platform leveraging WordPress core and WooCommerce subsystems. Designed customized administrative interfaces, product indexing engines, and security hardening patches. Created custom interactive scripts using vanilla JavaScript and CSS to enhance user experiences, minimize friction during checkouts, and protect user transactional data streams[cite: 243, 244].

title: Atomaton (V1): Metadata-Driven Framework R&D
tagline: Early-stage R&D into reactive, metadata-bound server environments and state compilation.
description: Researched and built a highly flexible server framework designed around metadata configurations. Deployed a backend layer utilizing Laravel to interface with PostgreSQL tables, coordinating with a Dart web runtime environment to evaluate custom techniques for data isolation, dynamic runtime parsing, and state rendering.

title: High-Throughput Digital Asset Distribution Subsystem
tagline: Engineered a long-term WordPress media distribution infrastructure that remains stable 10+ years later.
description: Designed and deployed a highly optimized custom WordPress core plugin engineered to dynamically handle bulk image proof sheets and multi-gigabyte client asset distribution pipelines. Built specialized server file I/O operations and database queries to ensure smooth rendering of digital proof packages under sudden high server loads. Engineered with deep adherence to strict API standards, the application remains fully functional over ten years later with zero security or runtime regressions.

title: Drone Spotter: Real-Time Edge Processing & Audio Analytics Engine
tagline: Built a Raspberry Pi edge appliance using Gaussian Mixture Models for audio classification.
description: Co-founded a real-time signal tracking tool and engineered its core audio processing codebases[cite: 237]. Programmed standalone Python scripts running on edge Raspberry Pi appliances to read real-time ambient audio streams and extract unique acoustic signatures using mathematical Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) to identify nearby drones[cite: 237, 239]. Extended the system into an emergency vehicle incident mapping platform by building a centralized Dart data broker server that calculated coordinates from multiple field nodes and displayed active alerts on a map UI[cite: 238, 240, 241].

title: Project Overwatch: Bulk Digital Archiving Orchestrator
tagline: High-throughput asynchronous image processing engine and file manipulation tool.
description: Developed a custom asset pipeline application optimized to accelerate large-scale family archival scanning workflows. Built an asynchronous photo manipulation engine that processed batch rotatations, automated metadata updates, and balanced file compression ratios. Coupled a Laravel backend server with a responsive user interface to handle hundreds of high-resolution graphic uploads without causing browser thread lock.

title: beatpoetmassive.com: Distributed Music Production Sync Engine
tagline: Bespoke Django media infrastructure for remote audio stem collaboration and version control.
description: Architected and actively maintain a high-performance studio asset distribution system to manage cross-regional multi-track recording synchronizations. Designed comprehensive database schemas to index complete project timelines, track mix variations, stem files, and automated production notes. Integrated early Large Language Model code compilation assistance to review logic boundaries, optimize SQL indices, and build reliable background file sorting microservices.

title: Trellis: P2P Gossip Web Provisioning Platform & OS
tagline: High-performance metadata ecosystem powered by Laravel Reverb and Dart WASM engines.
description: Currently designing and constructing a decentralized web platform operating system structured to instantly deploy modular client sites onto commodity LAMP hosting platforms via JSON configurations. Implemented a real-time event distribution layer backed by Laravel Reverb WebSockets alongside a blazing-fast user interface compiled directly from Dart to WebAssembly (WASM). Building secure data graphs using a localized trust-propagation layout to manage end-to-end peer communications safely.
